subcodes.first_line: In this day the attraction of Divine Unity is manifest, and the breezes of Revelation are wafting with such fragrance as to perfume the world of existence, O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز جذب احدیت ظاهر نفحات وحی بشانی متضوع که عالم وجود را معطر نموده یا حزب
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
